datasets.name: a72ca410
queryLines:
SELECT
    ci.type as incident_type,
    ci.severity,
    COUNT(ci.severity)
FROM
    claim_insights ci
WHERE
    to_date(claim_date) BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
GROUP BY
    incident_type,
    severity

datasets.name: 8f81c82d
queryLines:
SELECT
  c.hour,
  COUNT(*) AS incidents,
  SUM(injury) AS liability_amount,
  SUM(property) + SUM(vehicle) AS property_amount
FROM claims c
WHERE
    to_date(claim_date) BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
GROUP BY c.hour
ORDER BY c.hour

datasets.name: 2593a026
queryLines:
SELECT round(c.total_claims / p.total_premium, 2) AS loss_ratio
FROM (
    SELECT round(curr.total_premium, 0) AS total_premium
    FROM (
        SELECT sum(premium * months_active) AS total_premium
        FROM
          ( SELECT
              POL_EFF_DATE,
              POL_EXPIRY_DATE,
              premium,
              round(months_between(POL_EXPIRY_DATE, POL_EFF_DATE), 0) AS months_active
            FROM policies
            WHERE
              POL_ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
          )
        WHERE  months_active > 0
      ) curr
      JOIN (
        SELECT sum(premium * months_active) AS total_premium
        FROM
          (
            SELECT
              POL_EFF_DATE,
              POL_EXPIRY_DATE,
              premium,
              round(months_between(POL_EXPIRY_DATE, POL_EFF_DATE), 0) AS months_active
            FROM policies
            WHERE
              POL_ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN date_sub(
                :date_range.min,
                datediff(:date_range.max, :date_range.min)
              )
              AND date_sub(
                :date_range.max,
                datediff(:date_range.max, :date_range.min)
              )
          )
        WHERE months_active > 0
      ) prev
  ) p
  JOIN (
    SELECT round(curr.total_claims, 0) AS total_claims
    FROM
      (
        SELECT sum(injury) AS total_claims
        FROM claims
        WHERE
          claim_date BETWEEN :date_range.min
          AND :date_range.max
      ) curr
  ) c

datasets.name: 97c3945b
queryLines:
SELECT round(c.total_claims / p.total_premium, 2) AS loss_ratio
FROM
  (
    SELECT round(curr.total_premium, 0) as total_premium
    FROM
      (
        SELECT sum(premium * months_active) AS total_premium
        FROM
          (
            SELECT
              POL_EFF_DATE,
              POL_EXPIRY_DATE,
              premium,
              round(months_between(POL_EXPIRY_DATE, POL_EFF_DATE), 0) AS months_active
            FROM policies
            WHERE POL_ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
          )
        WHERE months_active > 0
      ) curr
        JOIN (
          SELECT sum(premium * months_active) AS total_premium
          FROM
            (
              SELECT
                POL_EFF_DATE,
                POL_EXPIRY_DATE,
                premium,
                round(months_between(POL_EXPIRY_DATE, POL_EFF_DATE), 0) AS months_active
              FROM policies
              WHERE
                POL_ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN
                  date_sub(:date_range.min, datediff(:date_range.max, :date_range.min))
                AND
                  date_sub(:date_range.max, datediff(:date_range.max, :date_range.min))
            )
          WHERE months_active > 0
        ) prev
  ) p
    JOIN (
      SELECT  round(curr.total_claims, 0) AS total_claims
      FROM
        (
          SELECT  sum(property) + sum(vehicle) AS total_claims
          FROM claims
          WHERE claim_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
        ) curr
    ) c

datasets.name: 2f9d512e
queryLines:
SELECT round(c.total_claims / p.total_premium, 2) AS loss_ratio
FROM
  (
    SELECT round(curr.total_premium, 0) as total_premium
    FROM
      (
        SELECT sum(premium * months_active) AS total_premium
        FROM
          (
            SELECT
              pol_eff_date,
              pol_expiry_date,
              premium,
              round(months_between(pol_expiry_date, pol_eff_date), 0) AS months_active
            FROM policies
            WHERE  pol_issue_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
          )
        WHERE months_active > 0
      ) curr
      JOIN (
        SELECT sum(premium * months_active) AS total_premium
        FROM
          (
            SELECT
              pol_eff_date,
              pol_expiry_date,
              premium,
              round(months_between(pol_expiry_date, pol_eff_date), 0) AS months_active
            FROM policies
            WHERE
              pol_issue_date BETWEEN date_sub(
                :date_range.min,
                datediff(:date_range.max, :date_range.min)
              )
              AND date_sub(
                :date_range.max,
                datediff(:date_range.max, :date_range.min)
              )
          )
        WHERE months_active > 0
      ) prev
  ) p
  JOIN (
    SELECT round(curr.total_claims, 0) AS total_claims
    FROM
      (
        SELECT sum(total) AS total_claims
        FROM claims
        WHERE claim_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
      ) curr
  ) c

datasets.name: 5f0fbb57
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  make,
  CAST(FLOOR(model_year) AS INT) AS model_year
FROM
  claim_insights
WHERE 
  model_year IS NOT NULL AND  model_year != 'null' AND
  to_date(claim_date) BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
GROUP BY
  make,
  model_year
ORDER BY make, model_year

datasets.name: 0d3d68cf
queryLines:
SELECT
  age
FROM
  claim_insights
WHERE
  age IS NOT NULL AND 
  age <= 100 AND
  to_date(claim_date) BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max

datasets.name: ede21342
queryLines:
select
  'liability damage' as type,
  c.type as incident_type,
  sum(c.injury) as amount
from claim_insights c
where
  to_date(claim_date) BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
group by c.type

UNION

select
  'property damage' as type,
  c.type as incident_type,
  sum(c.property) + sum(c.vehicle) as amount
from claim_insights c
where
  to_date(claim_date) BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
group by c.type
